title: Quick Torch
description: Place torches from anywhere in your inventory with a dedicated hotkey, Terraria-style.
body:
# QuickTorch

**QuickTorch** is a small client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 and later, that lets you place torches from anywhere in your inventory with a dedicated hotkey, Terraria-style.

![Config menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6de9e6d2b0c52cb4b6f49e777d28ac995e1528e7_0.webp)

## Features
- Press `V` to place a torch without moving it to your hotbar manually
- Uses torches from anywhere in your inventory
- Prioritizes the smallest matching stack first
- Supports normal torches and soul torches
- Optional support for redstone torches
- Optional fallback placement under your feet
- In-game config with `O`
- **Mod Menu** integration
- Optional **Cloth Config API** support 

![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32482726c354fb3639609e221c6aaae61eb33c7a.png)

## Planned Features
- A more polished config menu for older versions



## Requirements
- **Fabric Loader 0.19.1**
- Fabric API

## Optional Dependencies
- Mod Menu
- Cloth Config API

## Notes
QuickTorch is a client-side utility mod and does not need to be installed on the server.

## Modpack Permission
You may include QuickTorch in modpacks and redistribute it according to the terms of its license.
